title: [Atrium, Booth]
description: You are standing in a secluded alcove facing a wall of small, locked doors.  One of the lockers has been removed for you and placed on a marble counter.

wayto.16314: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go curtain'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go curtain'; end; $go2_restart = true
